steps.name: read-path-adapter
steps.summary: list_node_tree / list_node_tree_by_set 추가(node_service.py) + catalog service.py list_tree 위임 + test 4건 + verify catalog-node-adapter-s1 통과.

steps.name: write-path-adapter
steps.summary: map_content/unmap_content/category_count → programming_links(child_type=content) 기반 전환 + merge/delete 브리지 제거 + router 업데이트 + 22 테스트 통과

steps.name: set-service-adapter
steps.summary: set_service.py — list_sets/commit_draft/load_set/clear_draft/delete_set/update_set/preview_load_set/update_set → ProgrammingNodeSet/Node/Link 전환 + _copy_tree BFS 링크 정렬 유지 + test 12건(총 16건) + verify catalog-node-adapter-s3 통과

steps.name: content-mapping-adapter
steps.summary: router.py get_set_tree — CategorySet local import 제거 → ProgrammingNodeSet 사용 + 회귀 34 테스트 통과 + verify catalog-node-adapter-s4 통과

steps.name: legacy-drop
steps.summary: alembic 0044 마이그레이션(content_categories/categories/category_sets DROP) + catalog/models CategorySet/Category/ContentCategory 제거 + verify s5 통과
